user.title: JMA Nowcast Setup
user.description:
Set up Japan Meteorological Agency High-Resolution Precipitation Nowcast.
Detailed settings (forecast minutes, threshold, etc.) can be changed via Configure after setup.

data_description.use_ha_home: When ON, automatically uses coordinates from HA Settings > Home Zone
data_description.latitude: Used when 'Use HA Home location' is OFF
data_description.longitude: Used when 'Use HA Home location' is OFF

data_description.use_ha_home: When ON, automatically uses coordinates from HA Settings > Home Zone
data_description.latitude: Used when 'Use HA Home location' is OFF
data_description.longitude: Used when 'Use HA Home location' is OFF
data_description.forecast_minutes: Select one or more future time windows to check (up to 60 min ahead)
data_description.threshold_mm: Rainfall intensity threshold for alert. 1.0=light rain, 5.0=moderate rain
data_description.radius_pixels: Pixels around location to check. 3px ≈ 3km radius at zoom=10
data_description.scan_interval: JMA Nowcast updates every 5 minutes, so 5 min is recommended
